title: I would like to request the option to create tornado charts.
excerpt: Requesting the capability to include tornado charts as one of the available chart types. Having this type of chart would provide the ability to easily perform like for like comparisons.

posts.author: jthib (Jesse Thibodeaux)
posts.cookedHtml: Requesting the capability to include tornado charts as one of the available chart types. Having this type of chart would provide the ability to easily perform like for like comparisons.
